/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/llama-run.dir/run.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/llama-run.dir/linenoise.cpp/linenoise.cpp.o" -o ../../bin/llama-run  -Wl,-rpath,/home/josh/llama.cpp-master/bin: ../../common/libcommon.a ../../bin/libllama.so.0.0.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so ../../bin/libggml.so.0.9.4 ../../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.9.4 ../../bin/libggml-base.so.0.9.4
